title: Reject identical sender and recipient IDs for unicast OSCORE contexts
description: Trigger: oscore_ctx_create() is called with identical non-empty sender_id and recipient_id. lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c only logs a warning around line 520, then derives sender and recipient keys for a context the comment says breaks unicast OSCORE. Impact: direction separation collapses for unicast contexts, making the context ambiguous and prone to incorrect OSCORE behavior. Return OSCORE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM unless/until Group OSCORE semantics are explicitly supported.
close_reason: Fixed in oscore_ctx_create: reject both zero-length sender_id and recipient_id (lines 570-575). Uses saturating checks and explicit error. Matches RFC 8613 §5.2. Commit e791bd4ab.
